name: lyrics-tracer-raycast-extension
title: Lyrics Tracer
description: Search songs and trace lyrics line by line with quick copy actions.
author: agarfuin

commands.name: trace-lyrics
commands.title: Trace Lyrics
commands.description: Load lyrics from a song name argument and copy lyric lines while tracing.

preferences.name: defaultCopyMode
preferences.title: Default Copy Style
preferences.description: Select the copy format used by Enter in the lyrics list.

preferences.name: translationContactEmail
preferences.title: Translation Contact Email
preferences.description: Optional email passed to MyMemory to raise the free daily quota from 5,000 to 50,000 characters.

scripts.prepublishOnly: echo "Use npm run publish to publish this extension to the Raycast Store." && exit 1
